step_rationale: PP5 regulates LTB4 synthesis, a potent neutrophil and platelet inflammatory mediator.
mechanism: Protein phosphatase 5 controls leukotriene B4 production by regulating 5-lipoxygenase phosphorylation, amplifying inflammatory cell recruitment to the plaque.

references.title: Arachidonic acid fuels inflammation by unlocking macrophage protein phosphatase 5 after myocardial infarction.
